subject: Rewrite engine.py with all improvements
description:
Rewrite app/src/main/python/engine.py incorporating:
1. Full compare algorithm from desktop (jieba, number normalization, subsequence pinyin, punct-only diff)
2. Inline Word report (open original docx, red annotations + blue timestamps)
3. Fixed Baidu chunked transcription (returncode check, retry, WAV format conversion)
4. Remove dead LLM_MODELS dict
